name: crawlapi
display_name: CrawlAPI — Web Scraping for AI Agents
description: Scrape any URL with JavaScript rendering. Returns clean markdown, HTML, text, or structured JSON for LLM pipelines. Supports single URL, batch (10x parallel), and search+scrape in one call.

tools.name: scrape_url
tools.description: Scrape a single URL with full JavaScript rendering. Returns markdown, HTML, text, or structured JSON.

tools.name: batch_scrape
tools.description: Scrape up to 10 URLs in parallel. Results in same order as input; failures don't break the batch.

tools.name: search_and_scrape
tools.description: Search the web and scrape top N results in one API call. Perfect for autonomous research agents.
